# name: # Canonical dependency manifest for DELIVER. Columns are TAB-separated.
# Probe passes when the command exits 0. See PREREQUISITES/10-deliver.md.

install-hint: npm i -g pyright (or uv tool install pyright)

probe-command: command -v pyright-langserver >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 1; init='{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"processId":null,"rootUri":null,"capabilities":{}}}'; { printf 'Content-Length: %d\r\n\r\n%s' "${#init}" "$init"; sleep 4; } | timeout 20 pyright-langserver --stdio 2>/dev/null | head -c 8000 | grep -q '"id":1'
install-hint: capability-grade LSP probe (no-download): JSON-RPC initialize handshake — presence of pyright-langserver is NOT enough
HOST-PROVIDED MCP (driven, not shipped): the host registers chrome-devtools pointed at the system Chromium for live web-handler feedback. Needs a system browser — apt-get install -y chromium
npx -y @upstash/context7-mcp (up-to-date, version-specific library docs — knowledge-parity for handlers)
GitHub CLI (cli.github.com) — required by /deliver:pr-review for PR-number review and --post
npm i -g playwright && npx playwright install chromium — the committed STORY-test runner (separate from the browser MCP)
apt-get install -y chromium — ONE BROWSER: chrome-devtools drives the system Chromium (real-launch probe, not a presence check)
